module.name: coordplane
module.description: A 2-D coordinate plane (SVG) with a grid and axes, on which you plot points and vectors from the origin. Body = one item per section.
module.aiSpec:
A 2-D COORDINATE PLANE with axes and a grid, for illustrating points, vectors and quadrants. Block module body: one item per section split by `<!-- @ -->`: • a point: `x, y label` e.g. `2, 3 A` • a vector: `-> x, y label` (an arrow from the origin to (x,y)) Coordinates are numbers; the trailing label is optional. Use @chartjs for real data plots — this is a schematic axis diagram, not a data chart.
Parameters: • range (number 1..50, default 5) — the axes span ±range. • grid (boolean, default true) — show the background grid lines. • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — color of the plotted points/vectors. • size (select: sm | md | lg, default md) — max width of the plane (260 / 360 / 460 px). • xlabel (text, default empty) — label drawn at the +x axis end. • ylabel (text, default empty) — label drawn at the +y axis end.
Example: <!-- @coordplane range: 5, xlabel: x, ylabel: y --> 2, 3 A <!-- @ --> -> -3, 1 v <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Mark color
param.desc: Color of the plotted points and vectors

param.name: xlabel
param.label: X-axis label
param.desc: Label drawn at the +x axis end

param.name: ylabel
param.label: Y-axis label
param.desc: Label drawn at the +y axis end

snippet.label: Coordinate plane (points/vectors)
snippet.description: Plot points ("x, y label") and vectors ("-> x, y label") on x-y axes.
